message.content:
[cron:8231f723-5580-435e-a8d5-8962f4843495 Sage 🧪 — QA Review Sweep (daily)] SAGE_QA_SWEEP: Daily QA review — Sage Rule 1 enforcement.

## Step 1 — Check pending queue
Read /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/sage-qa-pending.json (if exists).
For each pending asset: read the asset file, run bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sage-qa.sh with its metadata, write verdict to sage-qa-log.json, if FAIL write to sage-qa-failures.json, mark PASS as cleared.

## Step 2 — LLM checks
For each item: check (1) meets the brief? (2) clear conclusion/CTA? (3) facts verifiable? Cross-check numbers against state files.

## Step 3 — Escalate failures
If any FAIL: write to /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/sage-escalation-pending.json

## Step 4 — Output
If no pending items or all PASS: output exactly 'SAGE: clear' and stop.
If escalated: output exactly 'SAGE: escalated [N] items' and stop.

Always output exactly one line. Never generate an empty response.
Current time: Saturday, July 18th, 2026 - 2:46 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-18 06:46 UTC

details.error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, access '/Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/sage-qa-pending.json'
